channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Son nom est Bond, James Bond, et son aventure 007 First Light sur PS5 est en précommande au meilleur prix
item.description: 007 First Light est le prochain jeu James Bond, développé par IO Interactive (Hitman), disponible le 27 mai 2026 et en précommande pour 47 euros chez E.Leclerc et 59,99 euros sur Cdiscount au lieu de 69,99 euros.

item.title: 'We wouldn't encourage willingly driving your vehicle into the water' — man arrested for driving Cybertruck into a lake to test its Wade Mode, police say
item.description: Tesla Cybertruck owner finds out the hard way after getting stuck in a lake and subsequently arrested for testing the vehicle’s Wade Mode.

item.title: L.L.Bean's Zip Hunter's Tote Is the Only Carryall You Need
item.description: Its do-it-all thermoplastic lining can both carry gear through wet muck and transport wet, mucky groceries home from the store.

item.title: Quantum ‘Jamming’ Could Help Unlock the Mysteries of Causality
item.description: To keep communications secure in a post-quantum world, cryptographers are digging down into the concept of cause and effect.

item.title: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
item.description: Last year I deepfaked my kid's stuffed animal to make it look like his plush deer was on vacation. It was an experiment to see if I could re-create the events depicted in a Gemini ad Google was running, and I never showed the videos of Buddy the deer on his adventures to my four-year-old. […]

item.title: How to watch Celtic vs Dunfermline: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Scottish Cup Final 2026
item.description: See how to watch Celtic vs Dunfermline live streams online and from anywhere for free, as the league champions go for the double in the 2026 Scottish Cup Final.

item.title: The new Sony A7R VI is incredible — but its arrival means the A7R V has hit its cheapest-ever price, and it might be a smarter buy right now
item.description: The Sony A7R V is no longer top of the range, but it's currently cheaper than ever and remains a formidable prosumer camera.

item.title: How to watch Leinster vs Bordeaux: Free Streams, TV Channels for 2025/26 EPCR Champions Cup final
item.description: All the ways to watch Leinster vs Bordeaux live streams online – including for FREE – as Bilbao's San Mamés Stadium hosts the 2025/26 Champions Cup final.

item.title: Best Buy's Memorial Day sale is packed with top tech offers — I've picked the 47 best deals on Apple, Ninja, Garmin, LG, Sonos, Hisense, and more
item.description: Here are 47 of the best tech deals available in this year's Best Buy Memorial Day sale, including savings on TVs, appliances, laptops, headphones, and much more — all hand-picked by the deals experts at TechRadar.

item.title: The Best Smart Sprinklers and Irrigation Systems: In-Ground Sprinklers, Hose Timers (2026)
item.description: We’ve tested almost a dozen options that handle everything from scheduling and weather changes to water conservation, so you don’t have to.

item.title: The FBI Wants ‘Near Real-Time’ Access to US License Plate Readers
item.description: Plus: Google publishes a live exploit for an unpatched flaw, the feds arrest two men accused of creating thousands of nonconsensual deepfake nudes, and more.

item.title: Cosmic Voids May Contain the Universe’s Best Secrets
item.description: Once dismissed as empty expanses between galaxies, cosmic voids are becoming one of the most promising tools for probing the universe’s biggest mysteries.

item.title: Northeast and Midwest housing markets are the tightest heading into summer 2026
item.description: With less overvaluation, lower exposure to the recent migration pullback, and fewer homebuilders offering large incentives, active inventory across these regions remains relatively tight. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: J’ai randonné pendant trois jours avec une montre de sport et ça m’a changé la vie
item.description: Pour la première fois, j'ai utilisé une montre de sport pendant une randonnée. Voici comment cette Coros Nomad a su me séduire en trois jours.

item.title: Best Memorial Day Deals: Garmin, Birdfy, Branch (2026)
item.description: Memorial Day isn’t until Monday, but sales on our favorite gear are going on all weekend.

item.title: SpaceX Starship V3's first test flight was largely successful
item.description: SpaceX achieved most of the goals it set out for Starship V3's first test flight.

item.title: Pourquoi cette faille Chromium menace Chrome, Edge, Brave et Opera
item.description: Google a rendu publics par accident les détails d'une faille Chromium signalée fin 2022 et jamais corrigée. Tous les navigateurs basés sur Chromium sont concernés, du Chrome de Google à l'Edge de Microsoft.

item.title: Test du RockMow Z1 : Roborock débarque dans le jardin avec un robot tondeuse AWD qui ne fait pas semblant
item.description: Pentes irrégulières, passages étroits et deux chiens dans les pattes : voici ce que vaut vraiment le RockMow Z150 après deux semaines de test en conditions réelles.

item.title: Ce MSI Prestige 2-en-1 ultra premium (OLED 2.8K, 32 Go, Core Ultra 9) coche toutes les cases et perd 100 €
item.description: Le MSI Prestige 16 Flip AI+ est un PC/tablette hybride bien équipé à retrouver en promo sur Darty pour 1 649,99 euros au lieu de 1 749,99 euros.

item.title: Pourquoi Tesla rappelle 14 575 Model Y pour un bout de papier
item.description: Tesla rappelle 14 575 Model Y aux États-Unis pour un autocollant de certification manquant. Pas de quoi paniquer, mais le défaut est passé sous les radars pendant six mois.
